name: mcp-server-go-quality
description: Runs golangci-lint, govulncheck, and nilaway against any Go project and returns a single sorted Diagnostic[] array with file:line:column. Use when an AI agent needs lint violations, CVE exposure, or nil-panic paths from a Go codebase in one call — tools auto-install on first use.
author: afshinator

tools.name: run_code_checks
tools.description: Run all three Go quality checkers (golangci-lint, govulncheck, nilaway) in parallel. Returns unified Diagnostic[] sorted by file:line. Use when you want a full quality sweep in one call.

tools.name: run_lint
tools.description: Run golangci-lint only. Returns lint violations, complexity, and security pattern issues. Use when you need fast feedback on style or lint errors.

tools.name: run_vuln_check
tools.description: Run govulncheck only. Returns known CVEs reachable from your code via call-graph analysis. Use when auditing dependencies for security issues.

tools.name: run_nil_check
tools.description: Run nilaway only. Returns potential nil-panic paths detected via static analysis. Use when diagnosing nil-dereference bugs or hardening new code.

tools.name: install_tools
tools.description: Pre-install golangci-lint, govulncheck, and nilaway with pinned versions. Use once at session start to avoid first-run latency.
